tables: Rajasthan RPSC State and Sub. Services Combined Comp Exam Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 607 Post

Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the State and Sub. Services Combined Comp Exam 2026 Recruitment 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 04/06/2026 to 03/07/2026 .candidates should read the RPSC RAS 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.
Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) Rajasthan RPSC State and Sub. Services Combined Comp Exam 2026 RPSC RAS 02/2026  :   Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 04/06/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 03/07/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 03/07/2026 Exam Date Pre : 06/12/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam Mains Exam Date : 01-02 May 2027

Application Fee (OTR) General / BC/OBC Creamy Layer / Other State : 600/- OBC / BC / EWS : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at Rajasthan E Mitra Portal or Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Payment Mode.
RPSC RAS Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per Rajasthan RPSC RAS / RTS 2026  Exam Recruitment Rules.
Rajasthan RPSC RAS Notification 2026 : Vacancy Details Total :  607 Post
Bachelor Degree in Any Stream in Any Recognized University in India. More & Post Wise Eligibility Read the Notification

How to Fill : Rajasthan Public Service Commission RAS Online Form 2026 One time registration is necessary for all the recruitment of Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC – so you can apply only after OTR. Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC RAS / RTS Recruitment 2024 , Candidate Can Apply Between 04/06/2026  to 03/07/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Vacancies Application Form in Govt. Jobs of RPSC Latest Govt. Recruitment Online 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If you have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
